recommendation_rationale.rationale: 6 delivered bounties are at least 3 days old by posted_at; oldest is #33 at 10 days.
3 open bounties are at least 7 days old.
17 active/review runx-skill rows are present; 5 are judge-family rows.
5 open/claimed/delivered titles contain 'judge' and use the same registry/PR/receipt artifact pattern.
12 rows are open but have non-obvious claim/funding presentation, such as identity gates or zero-cash funded goodwill.
All visible Sourcey docs rows are paid or delivered, so no open duplicate Sourcey docs inventory is present in the public board.
